description: CompositionGreen leatherette bag with glossy finish, black polka dots, side straps, two compartments and a separate chamber for mobile and cosmeticsBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleanerAn ideal party bag which also comes in attractive shades of brown, brick orange, chocolate brown and white, this accessory has zippers in the same colour as that of the body, making it look simple yet stylish. The round straps assure a good grip, while the two straps on either side are only meant to create a fashion statement. There’s ample space to carry your party kit and essentials. So go all out and add that glossy glitz to parties in town.
